title: Simurgh Daemon Proof
description: Canonical signed proof envelope produced by the cross-platform Simurgh integrity daemon (macOS and Windows). Mirrors the shape accepted by src/device/daemonProof.js:validateDaemonProof at the Stage 2.7 baseline.

type.$comment: Fixed message-type discriminator; rejected as invalid_type otherwise.

sequence.$comment: Monotonic non-negative integer assigned by the daemon per proof.

timestamp.$comment: ISO-8601 timestamp; rejected if more than 5s in the future or 30s in the past.

node_id_hash.$comment: sha256: hex digest of the daemon's SPKI DER public key; must equal the paired node hash.

daemon_version.$comment: Daemon build identifier; must be in the server-side allow-list (e.g. 0.4.5, 0.4.7, 0.4.11).

platform.$comment: Operating-system platform that produced the proof. Linux is currently rejected as unsupported_platform.

capture_excluded_window_count.$comment: Aggregate count of windows observed with capture-excluded display affinity (NSWindow.SharingType.none on macOS, WDA_EXCLUDEFROMCAPTURE on Windows). Any value > 0 escalates to Critical/manual review.

capture_restricted_window_count.$comment: Aggregate count of windows observed with restricted (but not excluded) capture affinity. Optional; Windows-leaning counter.

monitor_only_window_count.$comment: Aggregate count of windows flagged as WDA_MONITOR (Windows). macOS emits 0.

helper_state.$comment: Native helper state vocabulary; copied from daemonProof.js HELPER_STATES.

scanner_state.$comment: Scanner state vocabulary; copied from daemonProof.js SCANNER_STATES. 'unsupported_macos_version' is historical and only emitted by macOS.

scanner_version.$comment: Platform-specific scanner version. macOS baseline 2.5.0; Windows baseline 2.6.0.

scan_timestamp.$comment: ISO-8601 timestamp of the underlying scan that produced the scanner summary.

scan_duration_ms.$comment: Wall-clock duration of the scan, in milliseconds; bounded at 60000.

suspicious_window_count.$comment: Aggregate count of windows the scanner flagged as suspicious. Must be >= capture_excluded + monitor_only.

visible_window_count.$comment: Total visible-window count observed by the scanner; bounded at 10000.

privacy_mode.$comment: Constant privacy-contract marker. Anything other than 'metadata_only' is rejected.

window_fingerprint_hashes.$comment: Optional array of sha256: window-fingerprint hashes (max 256). No raw titles, HWNDs, PIDs, or process names.

challenge.$comment: Server-issued base64url challenge; 32 raw bytes after decoding.

signature.$comment: P-256 ECDSA signature over the canonicalised payload (sorted-key JSON, 'signature' key excluded), base64url-encoded.
